# CWE-260 — Password in Configuration File (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-260-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

type serviceConfig struct {
	Endpoint string `json:"endpoint"`
	Secret   string `json:"secret"`
}

// Vulnerable: loads API secret from a world-readable JSON settings file.
func ConfigSecretHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw, err := os.ReadFile("/etc/slopguard/service.json")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "config", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	var cfg serviceConfig
	if json.Unmarshal(raw, &cfg) != nil {
		http.Error(w, "parse", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	r.Header.Set("X-Internal-Secret", cfg.Secret)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
